meta.title: Ambassador Carla Sands on Reasserting U.S. Influence in the Arctic
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a discussion with U.S. Ambassador Carla Sands on America’s strategic relationship with the Kingdom of Denmark and U.S. efforts to address shared challenges and priorities in the Arctic. The conversation will be moderated by Hudson Visiting Senior Fellow Liselotte Odgaard.
